productName: Buddies Legacy All in One Tanker - Northern Lights - 1g - (I) - DOH
description: An all-in-one indica disposable vape preloaded with Northern Lights oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Grab-and-go convenience, with notes of pine, earthy, and woody, delivering settle-in, melt-into-the-couch ease.
